task_snapshots.title: 334d-05: Alert System & Merge Queue Display
task_snapshots.description: Implement alert panel showing failed/blocked tasks and stale agents with severity levels, and merge queue panel displaying orchestrator merge state. Build alert filtering by type/severity, clear controls, and real-time merge queue status updates. Target: src/bernstein/dashboard/templates/index.html (alerts-tab, merge-queue-tab sections) and src/bernstein/core/routes/webhooks.py (alerts endpoint) and src/bernstein/core/merge_queue.py integration. Completion: alerts display correctly with proper filtering, merge queue shows orchestrator state. [subtask of 5c08ace74a2c]
